spec_match.rationale: The builder demonstrates global `corner-shape`, per-corner longhands, `border-radius`, `superellipse(n)`, and the generated CSS authors need for this API surface.

interactive.rationale: Segmented controls, sliders, selects, token swatches, a live preview, copyable CSS, and parser probes all update the page in response to user input.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index promises a card builder with global/per-corner control, radius, superellipse exponent, colors, and ready-to-copy CSS; the page now covers each item.

edge_cases.rationale: Per-corner mode explicitly combines `corner-shape` with `corner-*-shape` longhands to show cascade precedence, and the edge probe verifies invalid `superellipse(foo)` input is rejected.

references.rationale: The see-also section now links to the ChromeStatus feature entry and the CSS Borders and Box Decorations Level 4 corner-shaping spec.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared CSS variables, flat design-system shadows, token swatches, and paired button background/text colors instead of raw hex color inputs or inline styles.

summary: The card builder now passes the local critique: it has references, tokenized styling, visible feature detection, explicit longhand-vs-shorthand cascade output, and an invalid superellipse parser probe.
